src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Wrap authentication logic in try-catch to handle BadCredentialsException and return a 400 response instead of a 500 error.
Change return type from specific ResponseEntity<JwtResponse> to generic ResponseEntity to allow returning error messages.
Remove incorrect fully qualified import and use standard package-relative import for SignupRequest.
Update import path for ClinicOwner to use camelCase package name instead of snake_case.
Update imports to reflect the renaming of the clinic_owner package to clinicowner.
Fix incorrect import path for MessageResponse by using the fully qualified package name instead of a relative one.
Add Swagger/OpenAPI security requirement annotation to enforce bearer authentication for the controller endpoints.
Remove the configure(WebSecurity) method for ignoring static resources, likely moving these rules to the SecurityFilterChain or relying on default static resource handling.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.human_impl: Removed: public void configure(WebSecurity web) throws Exception { web.ignoring() ... }

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update permitted URL patterns to match Swagger/OpenAPI 3 endpoints (v3/api-docs) instead of v2.
Add explicit security configuration for the /api/v1/visits/** endpoint.
Simplify the regex pattern for owners/pets to a standard wildcard match.
Add Enumerated annotation to persist the status enum as a string rather than an ordinal.
Change the relationship with Owner from OneToOne to ManyToOne to allow multiple consultations per owner.
Remove the OnDelete cascade action from the Owner relationship.
Change the relationship with Pet from OneToOne to ManyToOne to allow multiple consultations per pet.
Remove the OnDelete cascade action from the Pet relationship.
